title: Moosend vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Moosend vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Moosend and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. Moosend is built for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses Wanting Unlimited Emails At Low Cost
comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Moosend wins for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Ghost?
faq.a: Moosend starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
